en_title: Deltarune Chapter 6 Will Release in 2027, Chapter 5 Shatters Concurrent Player Records on Steam
cn_title: 《Deltarune》第6章2027年发售，第5章打破Steam在线纪录
subtitle: 独立奇迹
opus_summary: 即将满十年的《Deltarune》人气正旺，第5章发售即创下Steam同时在线新纪录290,973人，是此前峰值两倍多。

paragraphs.en: Deltarune's story will continue next year, as creator Toby Fox has set a 2027 release window for Chapter 6.
paragraphs.cn: Toby Fox已为《Deltarune》第6章定下2027年发售窗口，故事将在明年继续。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Deltarune Chapter 5 was finally released to much anticipation. Within hours of its launch, the release helped the game shatter its previous concurrent player record on Steam. Previously, the record was 133,920 concurrent players, now the record sits at 290,973 concurrent players, more than double the original all-time peak. Despite Deltarune being nearly a decade old, it seems like it has only grown in popularity over time.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，备受期待的《Deltarune》第5章终于上线。发售数小时内，它便帮助游戏打破了Steam同时在线玩家纪录——此前纪录为133,920人，如今已来到290,973人，比原先的最高峰翻了一倍多。尽管《Deltarune》推出已近十年，人气似乎只增不减。

paragraphs.en: With all of that said, Toby Fox isn't slowing down when it comes to continuing the story. In an FAQ on the game's Steam page , the developer confirmed that Chapter 5 is not the end of the story and Chapter 6 will release next year.
paragraphs.cn: 即便如此，Toby Fox在推进故事上并未放慢脚步。在游戏Steam页面的常见问答中，这位开发者确认第5章并非故事终点，第6章将于明年发布。

paragraphs.en: "We are aiming for a 2027 release," reads the FAQ. "Meanwhile, we will be periodically releasing information on the development progress of the game."
paragraphs.cn: 常见问答中写道：「我们的目标是2027年发售。同时，我们会定期发布游戏的开发进展信息。」

paragraphs.en: Previously, Fox noted how smoothly development was progressing on Chapter 6 and said that it was possible that Chapter 7 may enter full development in the near future.
paragraphs.cn: 此前，Fox曾提到第6章的开发进展十分顺利，并表示第7章有可能在不久的将来进入全面开发。

paragraphs.en: "This sounds crazy, but it’s not unrealistic that some staff members may start working on Chapter 7 before the end of the year," Fox said.
paragraphs.cn: Fox说：「这听起来有点疯狂，但部分员工在年底前开始第7章的工作并非不现实。」

paragraphs.en: It's unclear how long Deltarune will be supported for. Perhaps Fox will try to tie everything up in 2028, when the game reaches its 10th anniversary. As of right now, we'll just have to wait and see, but it has been a wonderful indie phenomenon to follow.
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚《Deltarune》还会获得多久的支持。或许在2028年，也就是游戏十周年之际，Toby Fox会试着把一切收尾。至于现在，我们只能静观其变，但这确实是一个精彩的独立游戏现象，值得一路追随。

paragraphs.en: We gave Deltarune a 9/10 , noting that it manages to impress despite the fact it is largely unfinished: "Toby Fox and his team have really accomplished something incredible with Deltarune and its new chapters, even if that accomplishment isn’t quite finished just yet. The fact that what appears to be a halfway point in the story can leave off on such a phenomenal and high-stakes note after roughly 20 hours still has me reeling knowing I’ve yet to see the true depths of where this adventure will lead."
paragraphs.cn: 我们给《Deltarune》打出了9分（满分10分），并指出尽管游戏目前远未完成，但它依然令人印象深刻：「Toby Fox和他的团队在《Deltarune》及其新章节中确实取得了相当了不起的成就，即便这份成就尚未彻底完工。故事看似只是中场，就能在约20小时后以如此惊人且高风险的收尾停住，这让我在明知还没看到这场冒险真正深度的情况下，依然感到头晕目眩。」

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的撰稿人，负责报道游戏、电影等娱乐内容。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
